description: This beautifully designed 4Bdrm/4Bth home backs onto the tranquil Siegel Creek greenbelt, offering exceptional privacy & serene nature views. The bright, open-concept layout features large windows that fill the home w/natural light. Step outside to your east-facing backyard w/spacious deck & gas BBQ hookup—perfect for summer entertaining. The modern kitchen is equipped with SS appliances, a gas stove, built-in microwave & large island w/breakfast bar seating. Spacious Primary includes walk-in closet & luxurious ensuite w/double vanity & frameless glass shower. Enjoy access to lush green space, scenic walking paths, children’s play area & community amenity room. A perfect blend of nature & everyday convenience!
